center.name: 阿拉瓜亚河
center.summary: 阿拉瓜亚河是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括紅嘴巨嘴鳥、Strong-billed woodcreeper、Araguaia spinetail，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Araguaia spinetail is found in east-central Brazil along the Araguaia River and some of its tributaries, in northwestern Goiás, southwestern Tocantins, southeastern Pará, and northeastern Mato Grosso

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: carajaensis, Amazonian Brazil south of the Amazon between the Zingu and Tocantins/Araguaia rivers The strong-billed woodcreeper inhabits a very wide variety of temperate, subtropical, and tropical forested landscapes

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: tucanus]] right|thumb|Red-billed toucan in captivity The white-throated toucan (Ramphastos tucanus) is a near-passerine bird in the family Ramphastidae found in South America throughout the Amazon Basin including the adjacent Tocantins and Araguaia River drainage
